title: Yeti’s wordmark is its best brand asset. It just got rid of it in a new ad
summary: Yeti’s logo is simple: just its name written in an all-caps sans-serif font, placed within a rounded rectangle. But to speak to new consumers, they’re getting rid of the one element that gives it brand recognition. title: What new AI design tools mean for brand typography
summary: Anthropic has just announced Claude Design, a tool that lets teams generate and iterate visual design outputs through natural-language prompts.
